name: Monster Munch
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the cereal, dried apricots, raisins, and peanuts.
2. Melt butter in a microwave-safe 13x9" dish on high for 2 minutes. Stir.
3. Add marshmallows and continue cooking on high for 2 more minutes, stirring until well blended.
4. Mix in peanut butter and stir until fully combined.
5. Spoon cereal mixture into the dish and toss to coat evenly.
6. Using greased hands, form the mixture into balls, using about 1/2 cup of mixture per ball.
7. If the mixture begins to harden, microwave on high for 30 seconds or until softened.
8. If desired, spread the mixture in an unbuttered 13x9" dish and allow to cool before cutting into bars.
Makes: 1 dozen balls or 2 dozen bars. This recipe is similar to Rice Krispie treats but with dried apricots and raisins for a fall-inspired look. For added decoration, shape the cooled mixture into cookie cutters using gel piping to create pumpkins, witches, etc.
